description: Defines rules for avoiding hardcoded paths, endpoints, field names, statuses, and magic values.

rules.name: Do not hardcode API endpoints in page controllers
rules.description: Frontend page controllers must use shared API endpoint constants or endpoint builders.

rules.name: Do not hardcode frontend navigation paths
rules.description: Frontend navigation must use the shared frontend path registry.

rules.name: Do not hardcode script paths
rules.description: Scripts must use shared path utilities and configuration files for paths and folders.

rules.name: Do not hardcode transport field names in services
rules.description: Services must not know frontend/API field names or build raw transport dictionaries.

rules.name: Avoid magic business values
rules.description: Business statuses, numeric codes, and reusable labels should come from constants, reference data, or centralized configuration.

rules.name: Do not hardcode SQL outside repositories
rules.description: SQL statements must only exist in repositories or dedicated persistence infrastructure.
